# CWE-918 negative: allowlisted outbound fetch (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-918-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

// CWE-918 mitigated: only approved CDN hosts may be fetched over HTTPS.

import (
	"io"
	"net/http"
	"net/url"
	"strings"
)

var allowedHostsPure = map[string]struct{}{
	"cdn.example.com":    {},
	"assets.example.com": {},
}

func ProxyPreviewSafePure() http.HandlerFunc {
	return func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		target := r.URL.Query().Get("url")
		parsed, err := url.Parse(target)
		if err != nil || parsed.Scheme != "https" {
			http.Error(w, "invalid url", http.StatusBadRequest)
			return
		}
		host := strings.ToLower(parsed.Hostname())
		if _, ok := allowedHostsPure[host]; !ok {
			http.Error(w, "host not allowed", http.StatusForbidden)
			return
		}
		resp, err := http.Get(parsed.String())
		if err != nil {
			http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusBadGateway)
			return
		}
		defer resp.Body.Close()
		body, err := io.ReadAll(resp.Body)
		if err != nil {
			http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusInternalServerError)
			return
		}
		w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/octet-stream")
		w.WriteHeader(resp.StatusCode)
		w.Write(body)
	}
}
